summary: Complete backend API testing for Devin Lab. All 20 tests passed: Chat API response cleanup (no XML tags), Permission sync/enforcement, Task CRUD, Task approval workflow, Task run with dry-run, Memory retrieval, Task chaining.
critical_code_review_comments: clean_response_for_user() properly removes <think> tags, <message_user> tags, and all tool XML tags
Permission enforcement via check_permission() correctly maps tools to required permissions
High-risk task detection (classify_devin_risk) catches keywords: delete, drop, shutdown, production, credential, security, token
Tasks with high-risk are automatically flagged with requires_approval=True
Unapproved high-risk tasks correctly return 403 when trying to run
Task chaining via next_task_id field properly persists and is queryable
seed_data_creation: Test creates/deletes tasks and memories prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully verified. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_devin_lab.py covers: permissions API (GET/POST /api/devin/permissions), task CRUD (POST/GET/DELETE /api/devin/tasks), task approval (POST /api/devin/tasks/{id}/approve-risk), task run (POST /api/devin/tasks/{id}/run), memory endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE /api/agents/{id}/memories), chat response cleanup (/api/agentic-chat). Devin agent ID: 1f38520b-5351-4476-83e2-7c07ae06f52c
